globalNews.title: Hundreds arrested and dozens of police injured after Champions League riots in France
globalNews.summary: Nearly 800 people were arrested after clashes with police which saw 219 people injured, including 57 police officers.

globalNews.title: Japan defence minister denies militarism and criticises China's 'huge arsenal'
globalNews.summary: Shinjiro Koizumi makes some of Tokyo's most pointed remarks yet in the dispute over Japan's military build-up.

globalNews.title: Ebola spread in DR Congo 'deeply alarming', MSF warns
globalNews.summary: The medical charity's comments come as the head of the World Health Organization visits the region worst-hit by the virus outbreak.

globalNews.title: Laos cave survivors help with plan to find last two missing men
globalNews.summary: So far, five men have been freed from the narrow, flooded cave but efforts are ongoing to locate two more.

globalNews.title: Colombia votes in presidential election that could redefine relations with US
globalNews.summary: The election is held after months of public recrimination between current left-wing President Gustavo Petro and his US counterpart Donald Trump.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin price targets $78K as BTC holders defend 'strongest near-term support'
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin’s bounce from a key holder cost-basis level has improved the case for further upside, with historical data pointing to $101,000 as a potential best-case target.

cryptoNews.title: Vietnam proposes allowing SMEs to use digital assets as loan collateral
cryptoNews.summary: Vietnam’s Ministry of Finance has proposed letting SMEs use digital assets, virtual assets and intellectual property as loan collateral.

cryptoNews.title: Cosmos-based Gravity Bridge halts bridge after reported $5.4M exploit
cryptoNews.summary: Gravity Bridge was drained of roughly $5.4 million in a suspected signing key compromise, prompting validators to halt the bridge while an investigation is underway.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin sentiment reaches most ‘lopsided positive’ ratio for 2026: Santiment
cryptoNews.summary: Crypto sentiment platform Santiment warned that the two biggest spikes in social media bullishness around Bitcoin have previously been followed by short-term price pullbacks.

aiNews.title: SoftBank says it will invest up to €75 billion to build French data centers
aiNews.summary: The goal, the firm said, is to develop and operate up to 5 gigawatts of additional data center capacity.

aiNews.title: ‘What a joke’: Github Copilot’s new token-based billing spurs consternation among devs
aiNews.summary: The golden age of Microsoft's Github Copilot appears to be at an end.

aiNews.title: Meta is reportedly developing an AI pendant
aiNews.summary: Meta seems to be making big bets on AI-powered hardware.

aiNews.title: I put Google’s 24/7 AI assistant Gemini Spark to work, and it’s actually pretty useful
aiNews.summary: Gemini Spark helps automate everyday tasks, from inbox summaries to local event planning, but it’s unclear why Google made it a separate product.

aiNews.title: As the browser wars heat up, here are the hottest alternatives to Chrome and Safari in 2026
aiNews.summary: We’ve compiled an overview of some of the top alternative browsers available today aiming to challenge Chrome and Safari.
